abilities.description: Up to one target creature can't attack or block until your next turn.
abilities.target_prompt: Select up to one target creature

abilities.description: Create a 2/2 colorless Drone artifact creature token with deathtouch and "When this creature leaves the battlefield, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life."

triggers.description: Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, you may return one of them to its owner's hand. If you do, you may activate loyalty abilities of NICKNAME twice this turn rather than only once.
